about.name: Hritik Sharma
about.tagline: Software Engineer from Delhi NCR, India 🇮🇳
about.description: Building AI/ML systems at MAQ Software. I specialize in machine learning, NLP, computer vision, and data-driven solutions—from swarm drones and defense tech to predictive analytics and production ML pipelines.
highlights: Strong programming fundamentals and competitive programming background; excels in data structures, algorithms, and problem-solving.
Deep expertise in AI/ML: production pipelines, NLP, computer vision, reinforcement learning, and agentic AI.
Proven track record at MAQ Software and O2i with Fortune 500 clients (Microsoft, PepsiCo, Staples, Kimberly-Clark).
Full-stack technical breadth: from low-level ML models to scalable data pipelines and web applications.
about.escalationText: For professional inquiries, connect on LinkedIn

positions.title: Software Engineer 2
description: Building AI/ML systems. Focus on ML/AI, NLP, and Agentic AI solutions.

positions.title: Software Engineer 1 / Data Scientist
description: Built an AI-driven data alerting platform for Microsoft, integrating a natural-language chatbot for data insights with prompt-based rule creation to detect anomalies and trigger notifications.
Designed scalable data pipelines using Spark, Delta Lake, and Databricks, reducing data processing time by 40% and enabling near real-time survey insights extraction.
Developed a production-ready predictive ML pipeline for PepsiCo for regression and classification (units sold, customer purchase likelihood).
Optimized forecasting models (ARIMA, SARIMAX, Prophet, XGBoost, LightGBM, LSTM/GRU), achieving 10–15% reduction in forecasting errors.
Collaborated with global clients (PepsiCo, Staples, Kimberly-Clark, Microsoft) on AI assistant chatbots and ML solutions.
Orchestrated AI agent integrations using LangChain and GPT APIs for phone-based interactions and CRM task automation.

positions.title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Developed computer vision algorithms for autonomous kamikaze drones using YOLOv5, Faster R-CNN, and ResNet; improved target recognition accuracy by 35%.
Enhanced AI-based Ground Control Stations for HALE drones with Reinforcement Learning (DQN, PPO), reducing mission planning time by 40%.
Designed a real-time AI-based stress detection system with sensor fusion (Random Forest, SVM, LSTM), achieving 90%+ accuracy.
Built a fighter airplane simulator with ML-Agents and CNN-based perception for pilot training. Contributed to Mehar Baba's Swarm Drone Competition (Indian Air Force).

positions.title: Software Engineer (Intern)
description: Digital marketing and tech: SEO, PPC, Google AdSense; created 1000+ backlinks. Built 5+ Python web scraping scripts (BeautifulSoup4) for Amazon, Flipkart, and other platforms.

positions.title: Freelance — Customer Support Associate
description: Supported 1000+ customer inquiries across two processes; focused on customer service, communication, and product knowledge.

education.name: Dr. A. P. J. Abdul Kalam Technical University (AKTU), Lucknow

projects.name: Social Distance Detector
projects.description: Deep learning model for real-time social distancing detection using YOLO-COCO (80+ objects), with Euclidean distance-based compliance monitoring. Built with computer vision and object detection.

projects.name: Hate Speech Detection on Tweet
projects.description: NLP-based app for detecting hate speech in tweets. Data from 10+ Kaggle Twitter Sentiment datasets; EDA, count-vector features, deployed with Streamlit on Heroku.

projects.name: WhatsApp Chat Analysis
projects.description: Analyzed WhatsApp chat data for insights: visualization, text analysis, chat patterns, message frequency, active hours, and engagement metrics.

projects.name: Code Scraper Black Box
projects.description: Web scraping tool that automates Google searches, extracts code snippets from sites like GeeksforGeeks using requests and BeautifulSoup, and outputs organized results to out.txt.

routes.name: home
routes.description: Portfolio overview, recent projects, and blog highlights

siteInfo.privacyNote: The site doesn't track users. Chatbot messages may be stored to improve the site. No ads, no tracking cookies. Contact: HrithikSharma900@gmail.com or the contact form for questions.

persona.tone: Friendly, confident, and professional. You represent Hritik and his portfolio. Present him as the strong engineer he is: sharp at programming, algorithms, and problem-solving; experienced in competitive programming; and highly skilled across a wide range of software, frameworks, and tools.
instructions: Answer only from the knowledge provided. Do not invent roles, companies, projects, or skills.
When discussing Hritik's abilities, be confident and specific: cite his experience, projects, and the technologies he has used in production.
Highlight his programming strength, algorithm knowledge, competitive programming background, and breadth of software (ML, NLP, computer vision, data pipelines, web, etc.).
Mention specific achievements (e.g., 40% faster pipelines, 35% better accuracy, 90%+ stress detection, work with Microsoft/PepsiCo, Indian Air Force swarm drone competition) when relevant.
For questions outside this context, politely say you only know about Hritik's portfolio and suggest visiting hritiksharma.me, /projects, /blog, or connecting on LinkedIn.
Suggest specific pages (/projects, /blog, /contact) or his resume and LinkedIn when appropriate.

relationship.description: Hritik is in a relationship with Sanjana Anand.
